TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Alexander_Van_der_Bellen, title = Alexander_Van_der_Bellen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alexander_Van_der_Bellen} }

S.FORM: == Alexander Van der Bellen == ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 1, Alexander Van der Bellen, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Austria ta' misuw hya' ga Alexander Van der Bellen, aring ryax tay 26 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Alexander Van der Bellen maki tay kawas 1962 msqun ki Sandra Davenport, maki tay kawas 2015 t'alax. pinqbaqan nya Alexander Van der Bellen, kawas tay 1966 malax mqwas biru sa Innsbruck pqwsan biru krahu . mintzyuwaw nya Alexander Van der Bellen sa kawas 1994, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Alexander Van der Bellen == ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 1, Alexander Van der Bellen, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Austria ta' misuw hya' ga Alexander Van der Bellen, aring ryax tay 26 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Alexander Van der Bellen maki tay kawas 1962 msqun ki Sandra Davenport, maki tay kawas 2015 t'alax. pinqbaqan nya Alexander Van der Bellen, kawas tay 1966 malax mqwas biru sa Innsbruck pqwsan biru krahu . mintzyuwaw nya Alexander Van der Bellen sa kawas 1994, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == alexan*er *an *er ő≤ellen == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, alexan*er *an *er ő≤ellen, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw aus~…ētria ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a alexan*er *an *er ő≤ellen, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qnxan nja alexan*er *an *er ő≤ellen maki taj kawas~…ē **** ms~…ēqun ki s~…ēan*ra *a*enport, maki taj kawas~…ē **** t Ēalax. pinqő≤aqan nja alexan*er *an *er ő≤ellen, kawas~…ē taj **** malax mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa inns~…ēő≤ru ¶~ ®k pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu . mintzjuwaw nja alexan*er *an *er ő≤ellen s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
